name: Guangdong Adway Construction (Group) Holdings Company Limited
summary: Guangdong Adway Construction (Group) Holdings Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, provides interior and exterior building decoration and design services in the People's Republic of China. It offers building decoration, electrical and mechanical installation, curtain wall engineering, and fire safety engineering works. The company's projects comprise a range of building and property categories, including commercial buildings, office buildings, industrial buildings, residential buildings, public buildings, and infrastructures and hotels. It is also involved in the production and sales of decoration materials and equipment. The company serves public and private clients, such as state-owned enterprises, government departments and institutions, listed companies, foreign-funded enterprises, property developers, and property management companies. Guangdong Adway Construction (Group) Holdings Company Limited was incorporated in 1996 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.
